capabilities.description: Strumenti di rete avanzati: tracciamento IP locale e pubblico, mappatura LAN (ARP), latenza (ping) e manipolazione DNS per evasione blocchi regionali.

entry_points: AI Function Calling tramite get_network_info, set_dns_servers, ecc.

capabilities.verification_step: Chiedere: 'Qual è il mio IP pubblico?' o 'Cambia i miei DNS su Google' (dovrebbe richiedere avvio come amministratore).
capabilities.notes: Le funzioni di modifica DNS richiedono privilegi di Amministratore di sistema.

capabilities.description: Native Browser Interface (localhost:7070) providing Chat and Configuration panels.
capabilities.verification_step: Navigate to http://127.0.0.1:7070/chat to verify UI loads.
capabilities.notes: Syncs with the Core system state.

capabilities.description: Hardware monitoring (GPU VRAM, CPU Load, RAM) and AI backend status verification.
capabilities.verification_step: Ask AI 'Qual è lo stato delle risorse?', verify telemetry response.

capabilities.description: Generates AI images from text prompts using Pollinations or Airforce APIs.
capabilities.verification_step: Ask AI 'Genera un'immagine di un gatto', verify file saved in data/images/.

capabilities.description: Capability to list, count, and read files from the local filesystem.
capabilities.verification_step: Ask AI to read a harmless file, verify output matches file content.

capabilities.description: Safe Python code execution environment (Zentra AST Code Jail). Can execute algorithmic tasks, math, data processing. Blocks dangerous imports (os, sys, etc).
capabilities.verification_step: Ask AI to print 'Hello Sandbox', check workspace/sandbox/ai_last_script.py
capabilities.notes: Native strict AST Sandbox. No external tools like Docker required.

capabilities.description: Smart home device control simulation and status reporting.
capabilities.verification_step: Ask AI to turn off the lights, verify JSON simulation response.

capabilities.description: Hardware volume control and audio mute/unmute functions.
capabilities.verification_step: Ask AI to mute system volume, verify OS mute state changes.
capabilities.notes: Directly interacts with OS audio mixers.

capabilities.description: Takes snapshots via the connected webcam for environmental awareness.
capabilities.verification_step: Ask AI to take a picture, verify snapshot saved in snapshots/ folder.

capabilities.description: Generates images from text using Pollinations or Airforce APIs.
capabilities.verification_step: Instruct AI to draw an image or use /image prompt command.
capabilities.notes: Configuration previously in config.json, now isolated in config_media.json.

capabilities.description: Immersive scenario management: loading characters and scenes for AI interaction.
capabilities.verification_step: Ask AI to list default roleplay characters, verify list is accurate.

capabilities.description: Legacy system tool. Root Access: terminal management, reboot, log diagnostics.
capabilities.verification_step: Send [SYSTEM: time] to AI, verify it responds with local time.
capabilities.notes: Commands: time, reboot, terminal, open:<name>, explore:<folder>, shell:<command>.

capabilities.description: Legacy web tool. Network access for Google searches and websites.
capabilities.verification_step: Send [WEB: search:Test] to AI, verify it triggers a browser search.
